calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
TENTATIVE RULING: Hearing. Appearance required to admit a lost will.
Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk.
Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME.
Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall.
Please review LRSF 14.1 D. for information on remote appearances.
For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879.
For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above.
Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.
EXAMINER: HELEN TROWBRIDGE

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR TEMPORARRY RESTRAINING ORDER AND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PRELIMINARY INJUCTION; MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES
Off Calendar May-19-2026 Off Calendar
EX PARTE PETITION FOR LETTERS OF SPECIAL ADMINISTRATION

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Apr-13-2026 Continued To Jun-08-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Mar-09-2026 Continued To Apr-13-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Sheila Robello for petitioner Derek Lief (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed.

Ms. Robello reported that an amended petition would be filed later in the week and requested that the appointment of the special administrator be extended due to pending issues involving a mortgage foreclosure. She requested a continuance to allow time for filing the amended petition and republishing notice.

The Court extended the appointment of the special administrator and continued the matter to April 13, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Michael B. McNaughton; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
EX PARTE PETITION FOR LETTERS OF SPECIAL ADMINISTRATION
